# Carlos Alberto — Senior Software Engineer & AI Innovation Leader

> Personal website and professional portfolio of Carlos Alberto, a senior software engineer based in Madrid, Spain, specializing in AI-driven systems, cloud architecture, and technical leadership.

## About

Carlos Alberto is a Senior Software Engineer and Squad Lead with 12+ years of experience designing, delivering, and scaling complex digital platforms across banking, insurance, enterprise software, and product-led environments.

He currently works at Nationale-Nederlanden (NN Group) in Madrid, leading a 6-person squad focused on replacing a legacy core banking system with cloud-native architecture. He is an active contributor to enterprise AI strategy and has participated in international AI hackathons.

**Location:** Madrid, Spain  
**Languages:** Spanish (native), English (professional)  
**Contact:** Available via LinkedIn and GitHub (see /contact section)

## Expertise

- **AI & Machine Learning**: LLM fine-tuning (LoRA), Ollama, Gemma 4, MLX, MCP Servers, RAG, Prompt Engineering, OpenAI API
- **Languages & Runtimes**: TypeScript, JavaScript, Python, Java, Bash, HTML/CSS
- **Cloud & Infrastructure**: AWS Lambda, CloudFormation, S3, Azure DevOps, Docker, Kubernetes, Cloudflare
- **Architecture & APIs**: Serverless Microservices, REST API Design, Event-Driven, Domain-Driven Design, WSO2 Gateway, GraphQL
- **DevOps & Quality**: CI/CD Pipelines, SonarQube, Jest, Playwright, ESLint, GitHub Actions, Jenkins
- **Leadership**: Squad Lead (6 people), Sprint Planning, Scrum (Certified), Code Reviews, Mentoring

## Featured Projects

### SIBA Semantic Shell
A domain-specific language that replaces 90+ raw MCP tools with a single compact grammar for enterprise operations. Achieves 63% reduction in token usage and 3× faster execution. Uses fine-tuned Gemma 4 model with LoRA.
- Tags: TypeScript, EBNF Grammar, MLX, Ollama, MCP

### Quick Quote AI Agent
Voice-first AI insurance quoting experience. Led a team at NN Hackathon 2026 at NN Group headquarters in the Netherlands.
- Stack: Python, FastAPI, React, Azure OpenAI, Whisper

### SIBA AI Agents Ecosystem
Comprehensive AI agent ecosystem for GitHub Copilot CLI: 15+ skills, 9 specialized agents, custom MCP servers. Features multi-agent architecture with intelligent routing and custom MCP servers for AzDo, WSO2, SonarQube, and AWS.
- Tags: TypeScript, MCP, AI Agents, Azure DevOps

### tmux-pilot
Background watcher and notification system for tmux. Monitors CI/CD pipelines, PRs, and quality gates with real-time alerts. Open source.
- URL: https://github.com/calbertts/tmux-pilot
- Tags: Bash, SQLite, tmux

### The Codigo LLC
Software development consultancy specializing in custom solutions, AI integration, and infrastructure automation. EIN-registered in Wyoming, USA.

## Work History

- **Nationale-Nederlanden (NN Group)** — Software Engineer & Squad Lead (Oct 2024 – Present, Madrid)

- **Optiva Media (Telecom)** — Backend Developer (Mar 2018 – Mar 2019, Madrid)
- **Klikin Deals** — Full-Stack Developer (Jul 2017 – Mar 2018, Madrid)
- **System Group IT** — Full-Stack Developer & Tech Lead (Jul 2016 – Jul 2017, Colombia → Spain)
- **Dreamcode** — Full-Stack Java Developer (May 2014 – Jul 2016, Cali, Colombia)
- **IP Total Software** — Java Developer & Mobile Lead (Feb 2013 – May 2014, Cali, Colombia)
